visuals.title: MESI State Transition Diagram
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350" viewBox="0 0 420 350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto">
      <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Cache Coherence</text>
  
  <!-- Main Memory -->
  <rect x="135" y="60" width="150" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Main Memory
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Processor 1 -->
  <rect x="60" y="130" width="80" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="155" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    CPU 1
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Cache 1 -->
  <rect x="60" y="180" width="80" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Cache 1
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Processor 2 -->
  <rect x="160" y="130" width="80" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="200" y="155" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    CPU 2
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Cache 2 -->
  <rect x="160" y="180" width="80" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="200" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Cache 2
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Processor 3 -->
  <rect x="260" y="130" width="80" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="300" y="155" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    CPU 3
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Cache 3 -->
  <rect x="260" y="180" width="80" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="300" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Cache 3
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Connection from Main Memory to Cache 1 -->
  <path d="M210 100 L100 130" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Connection from Main Memory to Cache 2 -->
  <path d="M210 100 L200 130" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Connection from Main Memory to Cache 3 -->
  <path d="M210 100 L300 130" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Coherence Protocol Arrow -->
  <path d="M60 230 L340 230" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Coherence Protocol Label -->
  <text x="200" y="250" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Coherence Protocol (MESI, MOESI, etc.)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Data Flow Animation -->
  <circle cx="210" cy="80" r="5" fill="#FF5722" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.6s" fill="freeze"/>
    <animate attributeName="cx" from="210" to="100" attributeType="XML" dur="0.8s" begin="3.9s" fill="freeze"/>
    <animate attributeName="cy" from="80" to="125" attributeType="XML" dur="0.8s" begin="3.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  
  <!-- Invalidation Message Animation -->
  <circle cx="100" cy="210" r="5" fill="#FF5722" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.8s" fill="freeze"/>
    <animate attributeName="cx" from="100" to="200" attributeType="XML" dur="0.8s" begin="5.1s" fill="freeze"/>
    <animate attributeName="cy" from="210" to="210" attributeType="XML" dur="0.8s" begin="5.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  
  <circle cx="200" cy="210" r="5" fill="#FF5722" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="6.0s" fill="freeze"/>
    <animate attributeName="cx" from="200" to="300" attributeType="XML" dur="0.8s" begin="6.3s" fill="freeze"/>
    <animate attributeName="cy" from="210" to="210" attributeType="XML" dur="0.8s" begin="6.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
</svg>
